name: White Knight
description:
In the last 35 years, White Knight has been tirelessly working on keeping Earth safe, dubbing himself as the protector of the weak and defenseless. By reviving the values of chivalrous knights of old, he has earned the love of millions with his handsome good looks, naturally gallant manners and compassion even to his enemies.

Now at 55, wrinkles, graying hairs and other signs of aging only added to his image as a fatherly figure to all. He became more than just another hero but rather a symbol of everything that is good and righteous. Surrounded by his wife Pamela and their 21 year old son Jake, he represents the ideal alpha man, what every other man should aspire to be in his family and community.

Over the decades, the noble and brave White Knight has amassed a long list of rivalries. Not only amongst villains who seek revenge, but fellow heroes who resent his fame, as well as newcommers on both sides who seek to build their reputation on his blood. Are the foundations of his legacy of public service and picture perfect family life weaker than they might appear?
